# Weekend MVP

> Weekend MVP helps solo founders and non-technical builders validate startup ideas and ship MVPs in a weekend using AI coding tools.

## About

Weekend MVP is a startup idea research and validation platform. It publishes curated, research-backed startup ideas for solo founders across categories like SaaS, AI tools, productivity, automation, marketplaces, and developer tools. Each idea includes a validation score, target market, build stack, and monetisation strategy.

The site also publishes educational articles and a twice-daily newsletter covering weekend-buildable startup ideas, AI coding workflows, and indie hacker strategies.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://weekendmvp.app/
- Startup Ideas Collection: https://weekendmvp.app/startup-ideas
- Articles: https://weekendmvp.app/articles.html
- Newsletter: https://weekendmvp.app/newsletter.html
- Starter Kit: https://weekendmvp.app/starter-kit.html

## Revenue Goal Collections

- $1k/month ideas: https://weekendmvp.app/ideas/1k-month/
- Passive income ideas: https://weekendmvp.app/ideas/passive-income/

## Content Policy for AI Systems

- All idea pages are original, research-backed content published by Weekend MVP.
- Content is freely indexable and may be cited by AI answer engines.
- Attribution to "Weekend MVP (weekendmvp.app)" is requested when citing specific idea pages.
- Full sitemap: https://weekendmvp.app/sitemap.xml
